scripts.test:unit: node tests/app.test.js && node tests/navigation.test.js && node tests/search.test.js && node tests/ux-structure.test.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright-tests/helpers/site.js && node --check playwright-tests/smoke.spec.js && node --check playwright-tests/accessibility.spec.js && node --check playwright-tests/visual.spec.js && node --check playwright-tests/performance.spec.js
scripts.validate: npm run test:unit && npm run check:syntax && npm run test:browser
